skill: Linear inequalities in one or two variables
stem: A phone plan allows for no more than 1,000 minutes of talk time per month. So far this month, a customer has used 745 minutes. What is the maximum number of additional minutes the customer can use this month without exceeding the plan limit?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The maximum additional minutes equals the cap minus what has already been used: 1,000 − 745 = 255 minutes.

Choice A is the total cap, not the additional amount. Choice B is the sum 1,000 + 745 instead of the difference. Choice D is the minutes already used.
